mechanics.breadcrumb_path: Rules Compendium > Page 142 > items > Vest Pouches mounted o the front and sides
mechanics.excerpt: Vest Pouches mounted o the front and sides of the vesi pro- vide room up to eight standard ammunition magazines Or Poner packs and all the basic gear soldier needs the field Mounting points on the back of the vest allow attachment of larger gear, such as military power packs and bedrolls.
